creator: freebsd@mhka.no
text:
Created attachment 199107
www_py-python-digitalocean_dependencyfix.patch

After installing py27-certbot-dns-digitalocean and running "certbot certonly --dns-digitalocean --dns-digitalocean-credentials somepath -d somedomain", I get the error message:

DistributionNotFound: The 'jsonpickle' distribution was not found and is required by python-digitalocean
Please see the logfile '/tmp/tmpvHDglP' for more details.

I could add this dependency directly to security/py-certbot-dns-digitalocean, but since this port depends on www/py-python-digitalocean and upstream[1] says the latter requires jsonpickle, I'll add the dependency in www/py-python-digitalocean.

See attached patch.

[1]: https://github.com/koalalorenzo/python-digitalocean/blob/master/requirements.txt
